## Source: amazon-inspector (88b87b18acc3a062d6a79eb7fd959cbbfea586694cf6d918aac1ddacaa062518)
The package bic-seo was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (7eeaff4f3318ed34f500a278b37ae6e39604797f0de8643056247dc4ab1ebc15)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'bic-seo' @ 2.0.3 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
